positive: A vibrant, symmetrical celestial forest scene, featuring silhouetted trees with bioluminescent leaves and root structures glowing in sapphire and emerald tones. The composition is centered, displaying a winding, stylized cosmic river (like the Milky Way) flowing through the forest floor. Include stylized, floating geometric constellations and small, whimsical glowing orbs (fireflies/fairy lights). The overall aesthetic is Art Nouveau mixed with modern cosmic vaporwave. Clean linework, high contrast black silhouettes against a deeply colored, luminous background. Ideal for screen printing on dark apparel. Cinematic, detailed, symmetry, high resolution, graphic design.
negative: blurry, watermark, signature, text, logo, dirty, grainy, noise, poor anatomy, extra limbs, low quality, jpeg artifacts, monochrome, photorealistic, abstract
